title: Ad Astra [16x]
description: A blue space themed 1.8.9 pvp resource pack
body:
Ad astra is a blue space themed texture pack made for 1.8.9 pvp.

It is based arround a mashup i've made between the Bonzai (purple) by HoodiePacks and the Devilled by WolfAva.

It is mainly themed arround the black items & colored border on ressources, witch makes it mainly a dark themed pack.

Here are some ingame screenshots to showcase the pack :)

![Ad Astra Preview 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bcaef3b21764b697ca9fc2941155b90f4f51b6e8.jpeg)

![Ad Astra Preview 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31bb32c8ec5166e773b6ee54f25148b2ac5387a0.jpeg)

![Ad Astra Preview 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9538728b6b2a130de240dabc2a9bffb63d511cc5.jpeg)

Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
